inputs.label: Time Zones Crossed
inputs.businessContext: Number of time zones crossed during travel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of time zones crossed during travel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat sırasında geçilen zaman dilimi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der während der Reise durchquerten Zeitzonen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fuseaux horaires traversés pendant le voyage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de zonas horarias cruzadas durante el viaje.

inputs.label: Direction
inputs.businessContext: Travel direction: 1 for eastward, -1 for westward. Eastward travel typically causes more severe jet lag.

businessContext_i18n.en: Travel direction: 1 for eastward, -1 for westward. Eastward travel typically causes more severe jet lag.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat yönü: 1 doğuya, -1 batıya. Doğuya seyahat genellikle daha şiddetli jet lag'a neden olur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reiserichtung: 1 für ostwärts, -1 für westwärts. Ostwärtsreisen verursachen typischerweise stärkeren Jetlag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Direction du voyage : 1 pour l'est, -1 pour l'ouest. Le voyage vers l'est provoque généralement un décalage horaire plus sévère.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dirección del viaje: 1 hacia el este, -1 hacia el oeste. Viajar hacia el este suele causar un desfase horario más severo.

inputs.label: Flight Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the flight in hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the flight in hours.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale du vol en heures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del vuelo en horas.

inputs.label: Pre-Travel Rest Quality
inputs.businessContext: Quality of rest before travel, assessed on a 0 (poor) to 10 (excellent) scale.

label_i18n.fr: Qualité du repos avant le voyage
label_i18n.es: Calidad del descanso previo al viaje

businessContext_i18n.en: Quality of rest before travel, assessed on a 0 (poor) to 10 (excellent) scale.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahatten önceki dinlenme kalitesi, 0 (kötü) ile 10 (mükemmel) arasında değerlendirilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Qualität der Ruhe vor der Reise, bewertet auf einer Skala von 0 (schlecht) bis 10 (ausgezeichnet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Qualité du repos avant le voyage, évaluée sur une échelle de 0 (mauvais) à 10 (excellent).
businessContext_i18n.es: Calidad del descanso antes del viaje, evaluada en una escala de 0 (mala) a 10 (excelente).

inputs.label: Operator Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the operator, as older individuals may experience stronger jet lag effects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the operator, as older individuals may experience stronger jet lag effects.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatörün yaşı, çünkü yaşlı bireyler jet lag etkilerini daha güçlü hissedebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Reisenden, da ältere Personen möglicherweise stärkere Jetlag-Effekte erfahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'opérateur, car les personnes plus âgées peuvent ressentir des effets de décalage horaire plus forts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del operador, ya que las personas mayores pueden experimentar efectos de desfase horario más fuertes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
